prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年西南财经大学在天津市综合科类最低录取位次分别为约4914名、4625名、5599名、9715名、6207名，波动较大。2024年因选科调整出现大幅后移至9715名，2025年明显回升至6207名，近两年呈恢复性前移趋势，2025年基准位次约6207名；该校在天津市招生计划持续缩减：2021年59人→2022年56人→2023年56人→2024年54人→2025年46人→2026年42人，2026年较2025年再减4人（缩招约8.7%），招生名额持续收紧，竞争压力进一步加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第66名（2025年第65名、2024年第70名），近年排名稳定在65–70区间，属于中上游211财经类院校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及预约入校政策等常规管理事项，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第92、评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录，整体报考心理平稳；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理获评A、统计学获评A-，财经类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年社会热度评估为"分化观望"，较2021年"推荐"（72.42）有所降温，但仍属偏热大类；天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增加约14%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；西南财经大学位于四川成都，非天津本地高校，天津考生报考存在一定地域距离因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6207名、2026年招生计划继续缩减（42人，较2025年减少4人）、天津市考生总数大幅增加（约82000人，+14%）以及学校声誉平稳、财经类专业热度分化等因素，竞争加剧推动位次前移。预测2026年最低录取位次约5763名，区间5263–6263名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southwestern University of Finance and Economics in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 4914, 4625, 5599, 9715, and 6207 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to subject selection adjustments, there was a large drop to 9715, but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 6207, showing a recovery trend in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 6207 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously shrinking: 59 in 2021 → 56 in 2022 → 56 in 2023 → 54 in 2024 → 46 in 2025 → 42 in 2026, with a reduction of 4 more students in 2026 compared to 2025 (a decrease of about 8.7%). Enrollment quotas continue to tighten, further increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 66th (65th in 2025, 70th in 2024), with stable rankings in the 65–70 range in recent years, placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 finance and economics institutions. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only routine management matters such as appointment-based campus entry policies, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating medium-low short video exposure. There are no records of the university experiencing a drop in admission in the abnormal filing documents, and overall application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, highlighting the university's strong performance in finance and economics disciplines, which strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors was evaluated as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', cooling down from 'recommended' (72.42) in 2021, but still within the relatively popular category. In 2026, the total number of Tianjin college entrance exam takers is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local Tianjin university, so there is a certain geographical distance factor for Tianjin applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6207, the continued reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (42 students, 4 fewer than 2025), the significant increase in Tianjin's total number of candidates (about 82,000, +14%), the stable university reputation, and the differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors, increased competition is driving rankings forward. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 5763, with a range of 5263–6263.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5763, range 5263–6263. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 5263 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting CPA direction, Finance joint degree program, Law dual degree). Candidates around 5763 are advised to focus mainly on Tier 2 (Statistics, Economics base class, Computer, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates around 6263 are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety net (Business Administration, Public Finance, Economics and Trade, etc.), while also aiming for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
